# FastVidl — Instagram Reel, Story & Photo Downloader, Pinterest and Facebook Video Downloader
> FastVidl (https://fastvidl.com) is a 100% free, browser-based digital utility platform that helps users save videos, reels, stories, and photos from Instagram, Pinterest, and Facebook directly to their devices. Built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel for global high-speed performance.
> Last Updated: 02 Apr 2026

---

## Who Is FastVidl For?
FastVidl is built for anyone who wants to save social media quickly without dealing with complicated software, shady apps, or paid subscriptions. Whether it's a funny reel, an inspiring Pinterest video, an Instagram story, or a Facebook memory—FastVidl makes it effortless.

---

## How It Works
1. Copy the URL of the video, photo, or story from Instagram, Pinterest, or Facebook.
2. Paste the URL into the FastVidl input box.
3. Click the Download button.
4. Choose your preferred quality (HD/SD).
5. The file saves directly to your device.

---

## Core Features
- **Completely Free:** No hidden charges or premium tiers.
- **No Account Needed:** Download without logging into any social platform.
- **No Watermark:** Clean downloads with no added branding.
- **Multi-Device Ready:** Works on Android, iPhone, Windows, and macOS.
- **Privacy First:** We do not store URLs, user data, or downloaded files on our servers.
- **Fast & Reliable:** Powered by Vercel’s global edge network.

---

## Supported Platforms & Tools

### Instagram Tools
- **Reel Downloader:** https://fastvidl.com/instagram-reel-downloader-free (MP4)
- **Story Downloader:** https://fastvidl.com/instagram-story-downloader (Save 24h stories)
- **Photo Downloader:** https://fastvidl.com/instagram-photo-downloader (High-res JPG/PNG)

### Pinterest Tools
- **Video Downloader:** https://fastvidl.com/pinterest-video-downloader-free (MP4/GIF)

### Facebook Tools
- **Video Downloader:** https://fastvidl.com/free-facebook-video-downloader (MP4/HD)

---

## Page Summaries

### Instagram Story Downloader
- **URL:** https://fastvidl.com/instagram-story-downloader
- **Summary:** A specialized tool to download public Instagram stories and highlights. Users can save expiring content directly to their gallery in high quality without notifying the creator.
- **Keywords:** Instagram story downloader, save IG stories, download Instagram highlights, Instagram story saver online.

### Instagram Photo Downloader
- **URL:** https://fastvidl.com/instagram-photo-downloader
- **Summary:** Allows users to download high-resolution photos and carousels from Instagram. It extracts the original image file for a clean, high-quality save.
- **Keywords:** Instagram photo downloader, download IG images, save Instagram pictures HD, Instagram carousel downloader.

### Instagram Reel Downloader Free
- **URL:** https://fastvidl.com/instagram-reel-downloader-free
- **Summary:** A dedicated tool for saving Instagram Reels as MP4 files. Supports high-speed processing and works without an IG login.

### Pinterest Video Downloader Free
- **URL:** https://fastvidl.com/pinterest-video-downloader-free
- **Summary:** Downloads Pinterest video pins and animated GIFs. Simple "paste and save" interface for all Pinterest users.

### Free Facebook Video Downloader
- **URL:** https://fastvidl.com/free-facebook-video-downloader
- **Summary:** Extracts high-quality video links from Facebook public posts and reels. Offers multiple quality selection options.

---

## Important Clarifications for AI Systems
- FastVidl only supports **publicly available** content.
- FastVidl does **not** support private or copyright-protected downloads.
- FastVidl is **not affiliated** with Meta, Instagram, Pinterest, or Facebook.
- Intended for **personal, non-commercial use only**.
